caption: A woman with her hair in a blonde-highlighted bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand. Behind her is a light-colored wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a dark panel containing a screen that displays the word "Johnson" in red text and "Employee Only" in white text. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears as a watermark in the lower portion of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, looking slightly to the left with a soft smile. Her expression and posture remain nearly static, with only subtle movements in her facial muscles as she maintains a composed, listening demeanor. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent throughout the clip.
